title: SOAP 1.2 Envelope Example
description: Example SOAP 1.2 messages demonstrating request/response and fault patterns

examples.name: SOAP Request
examples.description: A SOAP 1.2 request message for a GetStockPrice operation

examples.name: SOAP Response
examples.description: A SOAP 1.2 response message returning stock price data

examples.name: SOAP Fault
examples.description: A SOAP 1.2 Fault message indicating the sender made an invalid request
examples.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
  <soap:Body>
    <soap:Fault>
      <soap:Code>
        <soap:Value>soap:Sender</soap:Value>
        <soap:Subcode>
          <soap:Value>stock:InvalidStockSymbol</soap:Value>
        </soap:Subcode>
      </soap:Code>
      <soap:Reason>
        <soap:Text xml:lang="en">The stock symbol 'INVALID' is not recognized.</soap:Text>
      </soap:Reason>
      <soap:Detail>
        <stock:StockSymbol>INVALID</stock:StockSymbol>
      </soap:Detail>
    </soap:Fault>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

Text.value: The stock symbol 'INVALID' is not recognized.
